metadata.name: AI Models World - HBDS Model
metadata.description: HBDS structure describing AI providers, model families, model versions, capabilities, modalities, deployment options, and the HBDS AI Support menu workflows.
metadata.purpose: Reference model for AI provider concepts and the HBDS AI Support UI, API, manual ChatGPT workflow, security constraints, response validation, and regression coverage.

attributes.name: scope
attributes.value: Public, API, open-weight, enterprise and multimodal AI models

attributes.name: examples
attributes.value: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Mistral, Cohere, DeepSeek, xAI

attributes.name: role
attributes.value: Groups of related models created by the same provider

attributes.name: description
attributes.value: Model consumed through provider API endpoint

attributes.value: Source code, structured code edits, and generated snippets

attributes.name: description
attributes.value: Machine-readable JSON responses such as HBDS model payloads

attributes.name: role
attributes.value: Current HBDS UI section for AI model generation, validation, improvement, and manual ChatGPT copy/paste workflows

attributes.name: scope
attributes.value: HBDS model generation, validation, improvement, and manual response validation

attributes.name: options
attributes.value: OpenAI API, ChatGPT Pro / Manual, Claude, Ollama, Custom OpenAI-compatible

attributes.name: subscriptionBoundary
attributes.value: ChatGPT Pro subscription does not provide OpenAI API access

attributes.name: visibleWhen
attributes.value: provider needs user key and server key is not configured

attributes.name: autoValidation
attributes.value: typing a transient key automatically validates provider credential and selected model

attributes.name: feedback
attributes.value: green on provider success, red with provider cause on invalid key, model, billing, permission, timeout, or unreachable endpoint

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.value: Allow provider model identifiers not present in presets

attributes.name: visibleWhen
attributes.value: provider and model support reasoning effort

attributes.name: scope
attributes.value: HBDS model request, model validation, or model improvement only

attributes.name: requires
attributes.value: JSON only, metadata, hypergraph.class, hypergraph.link, layout none, computed positions

attributes.name: content
attributes.value: enhanced prompt, provider text, or manual prompt preparation result

attributes.name: credentialHandling
attributes.value: no HBDS login or password collection

attributes.name: action
attributes.value: parse strict JSON and validate HBDS structure before apply

attributes.name: rejects
attributes.value: Markdown fences, prose-only response, invalid JSON, missing metadata, missing hypergraph, invalid IDs, invalid references, missing positions

attributes.name: enabledWhen
attributes.value: validated HBDS JSON response is available

attributes.name: disabledWhen
attributes.value: no valid response or validation failed

attributes.name: noSecretsIn
attributes.value: model JSON, exports, diagnostics, debug logs, collaboration drafts, saved models

attributes.name: fields
attributes.value: providerId, modelName, reasoningEffort, operationMode, requestText, promptTemplateVersion, enhancedPrompt, manualWorkflow, aiCallEnabled, configuredOnServer, credentialStatus, connected, providerErrorMessage

attributes.name: connectionEndpoint
attributes.value: /api/ai/connection validates provider credential and model without exposing keys

attributes.name: meaning
attributes.value: HBDS_AI_ENABLED false or manual provider selected

attributes.name: meaning
attributes.value: response cannot be parsed as JSON

attributes.name: meaning
attributes.value: response includes Markdown fences and is rejected

attributes.name: meaning
attributes.value: Apply remains disabled before validation succeeds

attributes.name: meaning
attributes.value: Apply is enabled after valid HBDS JSON

attributes.name: coverage
attributes.value: provider catalog, reasoning effort, manual response parsing and validation

attributes.name: coverage
attributes.value: AI provider metadata, connection endpoint, enhanced prompt, no secret leakage, manualWorkflow metadata

attributes.name: coverage
attributes.value: pink UI, model combo, reasoning effort, automatic connection feedback, manual no-key workflow, response validation, no leakage
